nodes.title: POST /auth/login
nodes.description: auth.ts line 10: Accepts {username, password}. Queries users table by username. Compares password with bcrypt. Returns JWT token with {userId, username} payload. Uses JWT_SECRET from env. Returns 401 on invalid credentials.

nodes.title: POST /auth/register
nodes.description: auth.ts line 54: Accepts {username, password, name}. Checks if username already exists (returns 409 if duplicate). Hashes password with bcrypt (10 rounds). Inserts into users table. Returns JWT token.

nodes.title: GET /auth/me
nodes.description: auth.ts line 86: Protected by authMiddleware(). Extracts userId from JWT via c.get('user'). Queries users table by id. Returns {id, username, name}. Returns 404 if user not found.
